content.full_text:
January 6, 2004

Paul S. Petrovich, President
Petrovich Development Company
5046 Sunrise Blvd., Suite One
Fair Oaks, CA 95628-4945

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-304

Dear Mr. Petrovich:

This letter confirms the receipt of your December 19, 2003, request for advice regarding the campaign filings of Craig DeLuz, a candidate for Sacramento City Council. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of Mr. DeLuz’s, for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review. If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file a complaint (enclosed is a complaint form) with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
JWW:jg
